title: BHIVE Workspace is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: BHIVE Workspace is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
BHIVE Workspace, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BHIVE Workspace:
BHIVE Workspace is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BHIVE Workspace!
